channel.title: BenihKode — Seed of Code
channel.description: Where ideas are planted, code is cultivated, and growth is documented. A developer's journey from seed to harvest.

item.title: Finally, Async/Await Without Fear
item.description: Understanding async patterns in TypeScript changed how I think about concurrency.

item.title: CSS Grid Finally Clicked
item.description: After years of flexbox-only layouts, grid opened up a whole new dimension of design.

item.title: Planting BenihKode
item.description: Why I started this dev journal and what I hope to grow from it. The story of building a developer's garden from scratch.

item.title: Shipped My First NPM Package
item.description: From idea to npm publish — the journey of creating an open source utility.

item.title: The Bug That Took 3 Days
item.description: A story about a sneaky timezone bug that taught me about debugging methodology.
